taskTemplate.name: File Closure Documents
taskTemplate.description: Verify required documents are added to the eFolder to close the file

subTaskTemplate.name: Conversation Log
subTaskTemplate.description: Conversation Log – Add the conversation log to the eFolder; this subtask will auto-complete when the applicable document is added to the eFolder

subTaskTemplate.name: Disclosure Tracking
subTaskTemplate.description: Disclosure Tracking – Add the disclosure tracking document to the eFolder; this subtask will auto-complete when the applicable document is added to the eFolder

subTaskTemplate.name: eConsent
subTaskTemplate.description: eConsent – Add the eConsent document to the eFolder; this subtask will auto-complete when the applicable document is added to the eFolder

subTaskTemplate.name: Initial Disclosures
subTaskTemplate.description: Initial Disclosures – Save the initial disclosure package; this subtask will auto-complete once the initial disclosure package is saved.
1003 – Save a copy of the 1003; this subtask will auto-complete once the initial disclosure package is saved.
